name: NPC Social Diffusion & Rumor System
description: 实现 NPC 间的社交互动与八卦传递。当 NPC 在同一空间相遇时，交换访客记忆、地点评价或系统级传闻，形成动态的信息流。
scope: NPC social diffusion, social memory retrieval, prompt injection, and owner debug visibility
notes: Marked complete after validating existing social diffusion implementation and new owner debug visibility: backend emotional impact + social memory retrieval tests passed (49 passed), and frontend test/build passed in the social-memory-debug-panel task. Scope remains NPC/tavern memory diffusion, not visitor social networking.
